unflagged_notable.assessment: Analytically significant for ADD-004/ADD-005 context: Eli directly confronts Melissa about prior threatening behavior — specifically asserting that Melissa told Olivia she would 'punch her [another child] in her stupid face' or similar. Melissa denies. This is the first on-record surfacing of the RF-05 pattern as a topic of discussion between parties. Eli's willingness to raise this suggests it is a recurring observed behavior from the pre-record period (ADD-004: Melissa 'more dangerous' pre-2022). Melissa's ROW-1770 'That can lead to jail especially in these days' is notable: Melissa herself frames physical threats as jail-worthy conduct — her own standard applied to the behavior Eli is alleging. No new RF-05 threat from Melissa here; the exchange is Eli-initiated confrontation. Not flagged as primary. Documented for synthesis: demonstrates Eli's threat-awareness posture (ADD-005) and provides a text-record anchor for the pre-record threatening behavior Eli described.
